allow: Bash(node -e "const p = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('package-lock.json'\)\); const pkgs = Object.entries\(p.packages\).filter\(\([k]\) => k && !k.includes\('node_modules/node_modules'\)\).map\(\([k,v]\) => \({name: k.replace\('node_modules/',''\), resolved: v.version, integrity: v.integrity ? 'ok' : 'MISSING'}\)\); const top = ['argon2','better-sqlite3','dotenv','express','pino','ssh2','uuid','ws','vite','supertest','@xterm/xterm','@xterm/addon-fit','@xterm/addon-web-links'].map\(n => {const found = pkgs.find\(p => p.name === n\); return found || {name: n, version: 'NOT FOUND'};}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(top, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({'resolved': d['dist']['tarball'], 'integrity': d['dist']['integrity'], 'dependencies': d.get\('dependencies', {}\)}, indent=2\)\)")
